title: TraceCore Episode Config
description: Schema for episode configuration files used with tracecore run --from-config. Allows model, tool, budget, and seed to be swapped without changing task manifests.

agent.description: Path to the agent module (e.g. agents/my_agent.py) or a fully qualified Python module path.

seed.description: Deterministic seed for the episode. Must match the seed used for the canonical baseline to enable artifact comparison.

model.description: Model identifier to pass to the agent (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet). Agent must accept and use this value.

tools.description: Explicit list of tool names the agent is permitted to call. If omitted the task manifest's default tool set applies.

budgets.description: Per-episode budget overrides. Values must be <= the task manifest ceiling.

max_steps.description: Maximum number of action steps (turns) the agent may take.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of individual tool invocations.

max_wall_clock_s.description: Wall-clock timeout in seconds for the entire episode.

strict_spec.description: When true, the emitted run artifact is validated against artifact-schema-v1.0.json before the run is considered successful.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the run artifact under episode_config_meta.
